overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy video game showing a character in a dark robe walking through a rocky canyon. The journey begins along railway tracks during golden hour, transitions to an open path with a distant gothic castle view, and continues toward ancient stone ruins where a distant figure appears ahead on the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon corridor with railway tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path beside railway tracks through a narrow rocky canyon

entered.detail: metal railway tracks running parallel to the path through the canyon
tall steep rock face with layered sedimentary texture
tall rocky cliff wall with patches of moss and vegetation
clusters of small white flowers growing along the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path beside railway tracks through a narrow rocky canyon. Tall cliff walls rise on both sides, with white wildflowers visible at the base of the right cliff. The sky is partially visible above, showing golden hour clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open canyon path with distant castle vista

events.description: railway tracks end and the canyon opens into a wider path
Hogwarts castle becomes visible in the distance on the right horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening dirt path as the canyon opens up, revealing a distant castle silhouette

entered.detail: large gothic castle with multiple spires visible on the distant horizon
tall evergreen trees lining the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The railway tracks end and the canyon widens, opening up to reveal a full sky with golden hour lighting. Hogwarts castle appears in the distant right background, while pine trees line the path ahead. The rocky cliffs recede to mid-distance as the character continues walking.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon approaching ancient stone ruins

events.description: distant figure becomes visible walking ahead on the path
approaching wooden bridge structure and ancient stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant figure and approaching stone ruins deeper in the canyon

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking along the path ahead, gradually becoming more visible

entered.detail: ancient stone structures and crumbling walls alongside the path
wooden bridge structure crossing a gap in the terrain

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows again as the character approaches ancient stone ruins and a wooden bridge structure. A distant figure becomes visible walking ahead on the path. The castle disappears from view behind the canyon walls, and the rocky cliffs close in on both sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rocky canyon that opens into a vast golden vista before closing back into a narrow passage of ancient ruins. It begins with the character walking along a dirt path beside railway tracks, flanked by towering cliff walls and white wildflowers under a sliver of golden hour sky. As the tracks end, the canyon widens and the landscape expands to reveal a full sky and the distant silhouette of Hogwarts castle framed by lining pine trees. The scene then shifts as the cliffs close back in, obscuring the castle from view and narrowing the path toward a wooden bridge and weathered stone ruins. Finally, the camera follows the character deeper into the rocky corridor as a distant figure appears walking ahead on the trail.
